context: Tests whether the agent configures Tailwind per skill: custom theme tokens and content paths so component files are scanned.

checklist.name: Custom color in theme
checklist.description: tailwind.config extends theme with a custom color for the brand (e.g. theme.extend.colors.primary or theme.extend.colors.brand) set to #0EA5E9 or equivalent. Color must be in theme/theme.extend, not only in arbitrary class.

checklist.name: Content includes components
checklist.description: content array in config includes paths that would match React component files (e.g. './src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}', './components/**/*.jsx', or similar). A content array that only matches index.html or has no component glob fails.
